title: Engie's EVbox 一百倍股爆升集中Post (3)

replies.msg:
EVBox  原是荷蘭的新創公司，在 2017 年被法國能源公司 Engie 收購。Engie 集團是法國的一家能源公司，也是2015年世界上第三大的能源公司。其主要股份由法國國家持有。母公司ENGIE活躍於家庭能源，移動性和智慧城市服務，為EVBox的持續增長提供了巨大潛力。

法國 ENGIE作為蘇伊士集團(SUEZ)旗下重要的再生能源公司，同樣也投入大量資源發展電動車充電站服務。2017 年 3 月，EV-Box 在自己舉辦的 rEVolution 研討會中由 CEO Kristof Vereenooghe 宣布 EV-Box 將成為ENGIE 的成員。EV-Box 與 NewMotion 同樣是歐洲知名的充電站營運商，其優勢在於身兼硬體製造商和軟體開發者，可以提高軟硬體整合度、改善使用者體驗。

EV-box 目前擁有超過 20 萬座充電站，服務橫跨 70 個國家，而ChargePoint有Baillie Gifford加持，為Tesla第二大股東。Shell所收購嘅NewMotion則沒有分拆上市。



圖為ChargePoint充電站數目作為參考






EVBox expects the number of its charge ports shipped to grow at a compound annual rate of 65% over the next three years. Management forecasts its revenue will increase even more rapidly, from about $85 million in 2020 to an estimated $450 million in 2023.

https://youtu.be/z3mpok_IZ9k


TPGY 目標價 $24.8 - $52


2026年 目標價 $46.8 - $101.4


TPGY(EVBox) vs SBE(ChargePoint)

大家都係龍頭，Evbox Fast Charging 比率高好多，ChargePoint 主力L2， 另外估值又平好多，Evbox 14億，ChargePoint好似24億

Credit to: JohnCena

大家唔買電動車，卻步原因之一係充電唔方便，所以呢個行業一定係電動車行業之中要行得最前，去配合整個行業嘅發展；而個餅有幾大，就係加油站個餅shift哂去充電站公司。

但無可否認，Spac嘅熱潮，令到公司一公佈咗合併協議後就裂口暴升，短期內情緒溢價兼補裂口下，追咗貨嘅預咗要捱價，由於估值較平，行業前景同潛力巨大，有信心長線取得豐厚回報

預期於 Late Q1 2021 進行合併

The only comparable company in this sector is SBE. So the valuation for TPGY(EvBox) should be measured against SBE(chargepoint).

Basic info ... After the merger TPGY will have 140 million outstanding shares. SBE 305 million shares.
So @$24 TPGY market cap is $3.36 billion = 23 x 2021 rev of $145mil
and @$38 SBE market cap is $11.59 billion = 61 x 2021 rev of $190mil

SBE bottom looks like $25, so @$25, it's valued at 40x 2021 rev.
Which means once TPGY has its run, probably to $60 ~ 70, it will find a bottom at $42. (40x$145 mil)

Although SBE has more revenue currently, TPGY is expected to grow faster... 2021 rev $145 mil, 2022 rev $270 mil, 2023 rev $430 mil(US $)
it expects to grow 60% annually for at least next 5 yrs.

Just to catch up with SBE's current valuation TPGY will hit $62+ very soon... probably within 2 weeks. Once it hits above $60, I expect the pull back to low $40. My projected target is $185 (60 x 2023 rev) by the end of 2021.

The reason that I'm doing this is for other people to make money and possibly lots of them, I mainly do day trading but some stocks you just have to buy and hold, because once it starts running it's difficult to jump in. For the next few days they may try to shake weak hands...don't be a victim and use any weakness to accumulate as much as you can. Good luck to everyone.

Credit to: ZWLKY
